Al Rajhi Banking and Investment Corporation

overview.description: The Man Active Emerging Markets Alternative ETF (MEMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is actively managed and invests in equity and equity-related securities of emerging market issuers. The fund uses proprietary quantitative models and manager discretion to select securities, taking long and short positions, seeking to outperform a broad market index over a three-to-five-year market cycle. MEMA was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Man.
